items.title: Sri Lanka declares Wednesdays off as Asian countries try to conserve fuel
items.dek: This is the latest in a series of measures undertaken by Asian countries which rely on oil from the Gulf.
items.body: This is the latest in a series of measures undertaken by Asian countries which rely on oil from the Gulf.

items.title: Millions without electricity as Cuba's power grid collapses
items.dek: Cuba's chronic fuel shortages have been exacerbated by a US blockade on oil shipments to the island.
items.body: Cuba's chronic fuel shortages have been exacerbated by a US blockade on oil shipments to the island.
items.author: IriLine Desk
